name: Qualcomm Incorporated
description: Qualcomm Incorporated is a global leader in the development and commercialization of foundational technologies for the wireless industry. Headquartered in San Diego, California, the company is renowned for its Snapdragon family of systems-on-a-chip, which power a vast array of smartphones and mobile devices. Qualcomm focuses on driving innovation in high-performance, low-power computing, advanced connectivity, and artificial intelligence. By enabling intelligent computing everywhere, the company plays a critical role in connecting people, machines, and objects, fundamentally transforming industries and shaping the future of mobile technology and the broader digital ecosystem.
